DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to the first cause of action for negligence in the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. A negligence claim does not lie against a governmental entity for dangerous condition of public property. No opposition filed.

Order submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
